prompt:
Transform the original character into an elegant gothic lolita heroine while fully preserving her face, eyes, hairstyle, chestnut-orange hair, proportions, expression, and identity. Keep the same long hair and gentle anime beauty, but redesign the outfit into an ultra detailed black-and-white gothic lolita battle dress inspired by cathedral aesthetics and dark fantasy fashion.

The new costume should feature layered frills, lace sleeves, corset structure, rose ornaments, silver embroidery, gothic crosses, ribbons, pearl chains, delicate gothic armor accents, and asymmetrical layered skirts. Replace the bright heroic fantasy mood with a luxurious melancholic gothic atmosphere. Use black, deep crimson, silver, dark wine red, and soft ivory as the primary palette.

Add elegant gothic accessories:
black lace choker, crystal rosary, rose hair ornaments, lace gloves, thigh-high stockings with gothic garters, subtle armor motifs, tiny chains, and cathedral-inspired details. Her sword should become a refined gothic rapier with silver-black engravings and glowing crimson accents.

Background should become a moonlit gothic cathedral interior with stained glass, candlelight, chandeliers, black roses, drifting petals, antique architecture, and soft volumetric moonlight. Atmosphere should feel noble, tragic, beautiful, and emotionally captivating.

Anime masterpiece quality, ultra detailed, glossy eyes, cinematic lighting, dark fantasy elegance, gothic lolita aesthetic, highly detailed fabric rendering, beautiful lace textures, ethereal atmosphere, vertical composition, 9:16
